title: UK government defers capital gains on certain crypto with ‘no gain, no loss’ approach

summary: Bitcoin jumps on lowest US CPI since 2020 as traders stay wary of $64K failure

summary: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits

summary: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
